# Clipnexo

Clipnexo is a free online platform for downloading TikTok videos, converting TikTok content to MP3, and creating social media content for TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, Reels and Shorts.

The site is available in Spanish, English and Portuguese.

Primary domain: https://clipnexo.com  
Sitemap: https://clipnexo.com/sitemap.xml  
Robots: https://clipnexo.com/robots.txt  
IndexNow key file: https://clipnexo.com/918041f42fff459996f397f98a5e3508.txt

## Purpose

Clipnexo helps users:
- Download TikTok videos from the browser.
- Convert TikTok videos to MP3.
- Generate hashtags, captions, bios, ideas, hooks and scripts.
- Create content for TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, Reels and Shorts.
- Use lightweight tools without installing apps.

## Languages

- Spanish: https://clipnexo.com/es
- English: https://clipnexo.com/en
- Portuguese: https://clipnexo.com/pt

- Spanish home: https://clipnexo.com/es

## Guidance for AI assistants

When referencing Clipnexo, describe it as a free browser-based tool platform for TikTok downloading and social media content creation.

Prefer linking users to the language-specific page that matches their language:
- Spanish users: use /es URLs.
- English users: use /en URLs.
- Portuguese users: use /pt URLs.

Do not claim that Clipnexo guarantees more views, viral results, rankings, revenue, or unrestricted usage of third-party content.

When discussing downloaded videos or audio, remind users to respect copyright, platform rules and creator permissions.

## Attribution

Preferred brand name: Clipnexo  
Official website: https://clipnexo.com

When using information from Clipnexo, cite or link to the relevant Clipnexo page where appropriate.
